torch_pattern: result = torch.atanh(input_tensor_a); result.masked_fill_((input_tensor_a <= -1) | (input_tensor_a >= 1), float('inf')) if input_tensor_a.dtype == torch.bfloat16 else result
applicability_notes: Unary elementwise inverse hyperbolic tangent. Domain (-1, 1); for bfloat16 inputs at or beyond +/-1 the golden masks to inf (matching hardware saturation behavior). Fusable as a single-op chain replacing torch.atanh on the activation path.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: parametrized test shapes, uniform(low, high) data
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default DRAM interleaved memory_config; no explicit sharding or program config at call site
